name: Zombie Bounce
author: Poki
description: Zombie Bounce is a survival game where every shot counts! Face endless waves of zombies and aim strategically to wipe out multiple enemies with a single bounce. Use the bullet trajectory to your advantage, line up perfect shots, and unleash chaos on the undead! Unlock powerful upgrades and items to boost your firepower and keep the hordes at bay. Can you master the bounce and survive till the very end? How to play Zombie Bounce? Move your cursor to adjust the shooting trajectory. Click to shoot. Who created Zombie Bounce? Zombie Bounce is created by Endless Pixels. Play their other games on Poki: Zombie Rush , Brainrot Craft , and Paper Block ! How can I play Zombie Bounce for free? You can play Zombie Bounce for free on Poki. Can I play Zombie Bounce on mobile devices and desktop? Zombie Bounce can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
